tests.expected: SELECT name, age FROM users WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY name
tests.name: Complete

tests.expected: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price
tests.name: No where

de.description: Implementiere ein SQL Query Builder Pattern. Gegeben Operationen wie ['select', 'name,age'], ['from', 'users'], ['where', 'age > 18'], ['orderby', 'name'], baue einen SQL-Query-String. Gib die komplette Query zurueck.
de.hints: Baue die Query Schritt fuer Schritt, fuege jede Klausel an. Das Builder Pattern trennt Konstruktion von Repraesentation.
de.name: Builder Pattern

en.description: Implement a SQL query builder pattern. Given operations like ['select', 'name,age'], ['from', 'users'], ['where', 'age > 18'], ['orderby', 'name'], build a SQL query string. Return the complete query.
en.hints: Build the query step by step, appending each clause. The builder pattern separates construction from representation.
en.name: Builder Pattern
